summary: Defined the planning-only M7 Beta content-lock contract. The contract bounds scenario/person/event scope, review states, defect-only post-lock policy, explicit balance-tuning window, downstream M7 evidence mapping, Human Gate preservation, M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS carry-forward, and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE preservation without approving formal content lock or changing product/content/code scope.

tests_run.result: Modified allowed coordination/status files were present: project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/active/M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001.json, and project/tasks/thread-registry.json.
Task list shows M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 in REVIEW; downstream M7 tasks remain DRAFT.
No ready task output while M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 is in REVIEW.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001
tests_run.result: JSON shape ok: required 18 contract sections present; 5 decisions include advantage/cost/dependencies/counterplay; 11 M7 roadmap/matrix mappings present; status REVIEW; route_to systems_architect; Human Gate prepared only; DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE preserved.

decisions: Defined M7 content lock as a future Human Gate prepared by this contract, not approved by gameplay_designer.
Defined minimum scenario/person/event lock scope, required review states, post-lock defect-only policy, and an explicit balance-tuning window.
Mapped M7 Roadmap and acceptance-matrix items to downstream tasks and evidence without implementing content, code, platform behavior, release artifacts, or product scope changes.
Carried forward M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS, including Alpha scaffolding, local adviser evidence, batch tuning risk, and unsigned desktop smoke limits.
Preserved DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE exactly: manual node battle is only a post-1.0 non-blocking candidate unless a later Human Gate reverses it.
risks: Formal content lock remains unapproved until M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 receives explicit Human Gate approval.
Downstream M7 content, culture, balance, platform, save, and manual playthrough tasks remain R4-sensitive and require their assigned reviewers.
Post-lock tuning must stay limited to explicit evidence-backed tuning or defect fixes; content expansion requires new review and any applicable Human Gate.
requested_action: Review the planning-only M7 Beta content-lock contract for scope, architecture/process boundaries, downstream evidence mapping, Human Gate preservation, M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS carry-forward, DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE preservation, and no forbidden product/content/code/platform/release changes.
